Game.Name: Samsara Naga 2 (Japan)
Game.plot: Overview:Sansara Naga 2 is a turn-based RPG from Victor Entertainment and the sequel to the 1990 Famicom RPG Sansara Naga. The player is the scion of a dragon-raising clan and must chase after a villainous member of their tribe who has stolen a precious artifact important to the training of dragons. Along the way, the player can raise their own dragons, which help the hero (or heroine) in combat. Post-battle monster remains can be fed to the dragons to restore their HP and MP, or be held onto to sell later.Like the prior game, Sansara Naga 2 never saw a western localization. However, it has yet to receive a fan translation, unlike the first game. Both it and its predecessor were packaged together for a GBA compilation in 2001.
